title: A Super Strong Computer Chip That Can Handle Extreme Heat
summary: Scientists have made a new computer chip that can work in very hot places, like inside volcanoes or in space. Most electronics stop working when it gets too hot, but this chip keeps going at 700 degrees Celsius, which is hotter than lava. It is called a memristor and is built with special materials like tungsten and graphene. These materials help the chip store information and do calculations without breaking down. The chip was discovered by accident when researchers were trying something else. This invention could help make better robots, cars, and computers that work in tough conditions, changing how we use technology forever.

how hot something is, which can break electronics
a tiny part that stores data and does math
a strong metal that doesn't melt easily

questions.question: What temperature can the new chip survive?
Which material is used for the top layer of the chip?
What does graphene do in the chip?
Where could this chip be useful?

background_read: Computer chips are in phones and cars, but they often break when too hot. Scientists at a university made a new chip that uses special materials to handle extreme heat, discovered by chance. This could lead to better technology for robots and space exploration.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists at the University of Southern California
WHAT: Made a new chip that works at 700°C
WHERE: In a lab at the university
WHY: To help electronics work in very hot places like volcanoes or space

perspectives.description: The chip was found by accident, showing how surprises can lead to big inventions.
